title: cirsium × carinthiacum
intro: Cirsium × carinthiacum, also known as Carinthian thistle, is a hybrid thistle plant species that is a cross between Cirsium carthusianorum and Cirsium pannonicum. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cirsium × carinthiacum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
